## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Risk Areas

Check any that apply:

- [ ] install/update/release path
- [ ] session terminal or websocket input
- [ ] file read/write behavior
- [ ] credential or settings handling
- [ ] local port proxying
- [ ] BuildingHub catalog loading
- [ ] user-facing docs only

## Notes

No secrets, tokens, private logs, or generated runtime state are included.
